message:
feat(demo-showcase): add theme studio keyboard shortcuts and UX polish

Theme studio UX improvements:
- Add keyboard shortcuts for common operations (Ctrl+S save, Ctrl+Z undo)
- Improve color picker interaction with arrow key navigation
- Add visual feedback for active editing state
- Polish layout and spacing for better usability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
